channel.title: Python | my opinion is my own

item.title: EC2にpip、python3をインストール
item.description:
0.コマンド

sudo -s
easy_install pip
yum install python3 -y

1.pipをeasy_installを使用してインストール

[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ec2-user]# uname -a
Linux donald-dev-ec2-bastin 4.14.138-114.102.amzn2.x86_64 #1 SMP Thu Aug 15 15:29:58 UTC 2019 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ec2-user]# 
[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]# easy_install pip
Searching for pip
Reading https://pypi.python.org/simple/pip/
Downloading https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/4a/08/6ca123073af4ebc4c5488a5bc8a010ac57aa39ce4d3c8a931ad504de4185/pip-19.3-py2.py3-none-any.whl#sha256=e100a7eccf085f0720b4478d3bb838e1c179b1e128ec01c0403f84e86e0e2dfb
Best match: pip 19.3
Processing pip-19.3-py2.py3-none-any.whl
Installing pip-19.3-py2.py3-none-any.whl to /usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages
Adding pip 19.3 to easy-install.pth file
Installing pip script to /usr/bin
Installing pip3.7 script to /usr/bin
Installing pip3 script to /usr/bin

Installed /usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pip-19.3-py2.7.egg
Processing dependencies for pip
Finished processing dependencies for pip
[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]# 
[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]# which pip
/usr/bin/pip
[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]# 
[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]# easy_install --upgrade pip
Searching for pip
Reading https://pypi.python.org/simple/pip/
Downloading https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/4a/08/6ca123073af4ebc4c5488a5bc8a010ac57aa39ce4d3c8a931ad504de4185/pip-19.3-py2.py3-none-any.whl#sha256=e100a7eccf085f0720b4478d3bb838e1c179b1e128ec01c0403f84e86e0e2dfb
Best match: pip 19.3
Processing pip-19.3-py2.py3-none-any.whl
removing '/usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pip-19.3-py2.7.egg' (and everything under it)
Installing pip-19.3-py2.py3-none-any.whl to /usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages
pip 19.3 is already the active version in easy-install.pth
Installing pip script to /usr/bin
Installing pip3.7 script to /usr/bin
Installing pip3 script to /usr/bin

Installed /usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pip-19.3-py2.7.egg
Processing dependencies for pip
Finished processing dependencies for pip
[root@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]#

EasyInstall - Wikipedia https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/EasyInstall

EasyInstallはPythonのためのパッケージ管理システムである。EasyInstallはPython Eggsに基づいたPythonプログラムとライブラリを配布するための標準フォーマットを提供する。easy_installはsetuptoolsにバンドルされたモジュールであり、Pythonの標準ライブラリであるdistutilsの機能を高めたサードパーティ製のライブラリである。

2.python3をインストール

[ec2-user@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]$ python --version
Python 2.7.16
[ec2-user@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]$ sudo yum install python3 -y
Loaded plugins: extras_suggestions, langpacks, priorities, update-motd
Resolving Dependencies
--> Running transaction check
---> Package python3.x86_64 0:3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2 will be installed
--> Processing Dependency: python3-libs(x86-64) = 3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2 for package: python3-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64
--> Processing Dependency: python3-setuptools for package: python3-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64
--> Processing Dependency: python3-pip for package: python3-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64
--> Processing Dependency: libpython3.7m.so.1.0()(64bit) for package: python3-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64
--> Running transaction check
---> Package python3-libs.x86_64 0:3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2 will be installed
---> Package python3-pip.noarch 0:9.0.3-1.amzn2.0.1 will be installed
---> Package python3-setuptools.noarch 0:38.4.0-3.amzn2.0.6 will be installed
--> Finished Dependency Resolution

Dependencies Resolved

============================================================================================================================================================================================
 Package                                           Arch                                  Version                                            Repository                                 Size
============================================================================================================================================================================================
Installing:
 python3                                           x86_64                                3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2                                  amzn2-core                                 71 k
Installing for dependencies:
 python3-libs                                      x86_64                                3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2                                  amzn2-core                                9.0 M
 python3-pip                                       noarch                                9.0.3-1.amzn2.0.1                                  amzn2-core                                1.9 M
 python3-setuptools                                noarch                                38.4.0-3.amzn2.0.6                                 amzn2-core                                617 k

Transaction Summary
============================================================================================================================================================================================
Install  1 Package (+3 Dependent packages)

Total download size: 12 M
Installed size: 50 M
Downloading packages:
(1/4): python3-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64.rpm                                                                                                                          |  71 kB  00:00:00     
(2/4): python3-pip-9.0.3-1.amzn2.0.1.noarch.rpm                                                                                                                      | 1.9 MB  00:00:00     
(3/4): python3-setuptools-38.4.0-3.amzn2.0.6.noarch.rpm                                                                                                              | 617 kB  00:00:00     
(4/4): python3-libs-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64.rpm                                                                                                                     | 9.0 MB  00:00:00     
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Total                                                                                                                                                        45 MB/s |  12 MB  00:00:00     
Running transaction check
Running transaction test
Transaction test succeeded
Running transaction
  Installing : python3-libs-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64                                                                                                                                    1/4 
  Installing : python3-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64                                                                                                                                         2/4 
  Installing : python3-setuptools-38.4.0-3.amzn2.0.6.noarch                                                                                                                             3/4 
  Installing : python3-pip-9.0.3-1.amzn2.0.1.noarch                                                                                                                                     4/4 
  Verifying  : python3-setuptools-38.4.0-3.amzn2.0.6.noarch                                                                                                                             1/4 
  Verifying  : python3-libs-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64                                                                                                                                    2/4 
  Verifying  : python3-3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2.x86_64                                                                                                                                         3/4 
  Verifying  : python3-pip-9.0.3-1.amzn2.0.1.noarch                                                                                                                                     4/4 

Installed:
  python3.x86_64 0:3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2                                                                                                                                                        

Dependency Installed:
  python3-libs.x86_64 0:3.7.4-1.amzn2.0.2                     python3-pip.noarch 0:9.0.3-1.amzn2.0.1                     python3-setuptools.noarch 0:38.4.0-3.amzn2.0.6                    

Complete!
[ec2-user@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]$ 
[ec2-user@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]$ which python3 
/usr/bin/python3
[ec2-user@donald-dev-ec2-bastin ~]$
